title: Belvisia mucronata
taxonomy: Belvisia mucronata is classified within the plant family Melanthiaceae, a family of flowering plants commonly known as the "true yellows." This family is a part of the larger order Liliales. The family Melanthiaceae is further divided into several genera, with Belvisia being one of them. This plant is native to tropical and subtropical regions, and its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history. The classification of Belvisia mucronata is an example of the ongoing efforts to understand and categorize the diversity of plant life on Earth.
